import requests


def fetch_user(url: str) -> dict:
    pool = requests.adapters.HTTPAdapter(pool_connections=1, pool_maxsize=1)
    session = requests.Session()
    session.mount("https://", pool)
    return session.get(url).json()


def fetch_orders(url: str) -> list:
    pool = requests.adapters.HTTPAdapter(pool_connections=1, pool_maxsize=1)
    session = requests.Session()
    session.mount("https://", pool)
    return session.get(url).json()


def fetch_products(url: str) -> list:
    pool = requests.adapters.HTTPAdapter(pool_connections=1, pool_maxsize=1)
    session = requests.Session()
    session.mount("https://", pool)
    return session.get(url).json()
